title: Level 1 – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
Level 1
Research data that can be accessed by the general public.
Examples:
Research data that has been de-identified in accordance with applicable rules, published research, published information about Duke Kunshan University, or public-facing websites.
Storage Options:
To comply with requirements for Level 1 research data, any electronic devices used to collect or store data must be properly configured. Click here to download the Research Data Storage Charts.
How to Comply:
If you use an electronic device to collect and/or store Duke Kunshan Level 1 research data, you are responsible for ensuring it is secure and properly encrypted. If your device is not encrypted and it will be used to collect or store research data, please contact Duke Kunshan’s IT Service Desk.
